scripts.dev:deploy: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && npm run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:node" "npm run dev:deploy" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
